Change 1: Replace:
  # aggregation for clubs / current clubs
              if p in ("club", "currentclub"):
                  if len(objs) == 1:
                      base = f"{s} plays for {objs[0]}"
                  else:
                      clubs = ", ".join(objs[:-1]) + f" and {objs[-1]}"

                  sub_phrases.append(base)
                  continue
with:
  # aggregation for clubs / current clubs with natural progression
              if p in ("club", "currentclub"):
                  # render each club clause (includes possible manager/ground info)
                  rendered_clauses = [render(s, p, obj) for obj in objs]
                  if len(rendered_clauses) == 1:
                      sub_phrases.append(rendered_clauses[0])
                  else:
                      # first club as primary, subsequent clubs prefixed with "also"
                      first_clause = rendered_clauses[0]
                      other_clauses = []
                      for clause in rendered_clauses[1:]:
                          # replace the subject with "also" to avoid repetition
                          if clause.startswith(f"{s} "):
                              clause = clause.replace(f"{s} ", f"{s} also ", 1)
                          else:
                              clause = "also " + clause
                          other_clauses.append(clause)
                      combined = ", ".join([first_clause] + other_clauses)
                      sub_phrases.append(combined)
                  continue
